summary: PR #3 for S1 was returned to Claude because review exposed a planning mismatch rather than a pure implementation defect.
next_action: Replan S1 by replacing the Cmd+Tab requirement with a review-safe in-app shortcut contract and add a canonical `### S1` section to ai/acceptance.md before sending the repo back to Codex.

discovered_issues.summary: The current S1 task contract requires Cmd+Tab session cycling, but PR review correctly flagged that shortcut as conflicting with the macOS application switcher.
ai/acceptance.md does not include a canonical `### S1` section, so PR remediation no longer has a task-specific acceptance contract.

next_steps: Update ai/tasks.md and ai/acceptance.md so the S1 shortcut and acceptance contract match review-safe behavior.
Decide whether the existing branch should keep the current shortcut implementation, switch to a new in-app shortcut, or split shortcut work into a follow-up task.
Set the repo back to ready_for_codex only after the S1 plan and acceptance contract are consistent.
blockers: Codex cannot resolve the shortcut conflict or the missing S1 acceptance section because ai/tasks.md and ai/acceptance.md are planner-owned files.
